rows.label: qev030608_MSG0001
rows.name:
What do you mean marriage, na!
It's obvious that both Heptana-san and Enneana-san
would hate a useless brother like mine, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG0002
rows.name:
If he wants to get married,
he needs to become a much better warrior
first, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG1001
rows.name:
To think Heptana-san
is going to marry my useless brother... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG1002
rows.name:
Among the Bias men,
there are mountains of guys stronger and manlier than my brother,
so I just can't believe it, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG2001
rows.name:
Grandpa Aldo, who's been prone to illness,
came to the wedding, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG2002
rows.name:
Ever since we were captured by the Growth, he's always
seemed to be in pain, na,
so it makes me happy to see him looking like he's having fun, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG3001
rows.name:
To think that idiot brother of mine can look so respectable...
Marriage is kind of amazing, na.
I'd like to try it someday too, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030608_MSG4001
rows.name:

is going to marry my useless brother... [ST:wait ]

there are mountains of guys stronger and manlier than my brother,
so I just can't believe it, na! [ST:wait ]
